title: Vue Mixins Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of logic reusability, option merging rules, and the modern transition to Composables.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primary role of a Mixin in Vue.js?
options: To provide a flexible way to distribute reusable functionalities for Vue components.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.
To replace the standard HTML input elements.

questions.question: Which option is used to include Mixins in a Vue component definition?
Which hook is generally called first when both a Mixin and a component define it?
options: They are called at the same time.
Only one will be called based on its ID.

questions.question: Does a Mixin define its own data, methods, and lifecycle hooks just like a standard component?
options: Yes, it is just an object containing Vue component options.
Only in older versions of Vue.

questions.question: Modern Vue 3 development generally prefers using ________ instead of Mixins for logic reusability.
